source_pr.title: executor: push-down LoadDataStmt in distsql
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

push-down `LoadDataStmt` in `distsql`

### What is changed and how it works?

Add `InLoadDataStmt` in `statementContextToFlags` of `executor/distsql.go`

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Code changes

 - None

Side effects

 - None

Related changes

 - https://github.com/pingcap/parser/pull/372

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to instability introduced during test-infrastructure migration or refactoring (framework changes, fixtures/setup/teardown, or helper updates). Test-framework migrations can introduce subtle setup/teardown or helper mismatches that surface as flakiness. This PR stabilizes it by: executor: push-down LoadDataStmt in distsql.

evidence: files: executor/admin.go, executor/builder.go, executor/distsql.go, go.mod, go.sum, sessionctx/stmtctx/stmtctx.go, sessionctx/stmtctx/stmtctx_test.go
